strengths: Proven experience building event-driven systems and open-source infrastructure with real-world deployment (GISCollective, DLang services)
Demonstrated full-stack engineering agility across languages and domains, including AI-agent tooling at re:cinq
Strong track record in engineering culture building through workshops, TDD advocacy, and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No explicit evidence of multi-agent AI systems in production fintech or regulated environments
Lack of documented leadership experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or managing external engineering partners
Limited visibility into real-time inference systems, credit-risk modeling, or financial compliance infrastructure
response.justification: The candidate brings strong systems engineering depth, open-source initiative, and cultural leadership but lacks demonstrable experience in agentic AI at scale within regulated fintech environments, which is critical for this role’s core responsibilities.
